residual_risks: Concurrent fullSync() calls possible when online event fires while mount fullSync is still in progress — syncEngine uses navigator.locks for serialization, so this is safe by design
handleOnline closes over stale setStatus/markComplete vs reading from getState() on each call — currently reads getState() inline so not stale, design is correct
testing_gaps: No test for concurrent online event during in-progress mount fullSync (acceptable given serialization is in syncEngine)
